serverInfo.name: testmesh
serverInfo.description: TestMesh MCP server — analyze services, generate test flows, run E2E tests, and get coverage insights across HTTP, Kafka, gRPC, WebSocket, and database protocols.

tools.name: analyze_workspace
tools.description: Analyze an entire TestMesh workspace to understand its services and test coverage

tools.name: analyze_service
tools.description: Deep-analyze a specific service including endpoints, schemas, and dependencies

tools.name: generate_flow
tools.description: Generate a YAML test flow for a service or scenario using AI

tools.name: generate_test_plan
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive test plan with layered coverage strategy

tools.name: run_flow
tools.description: Execute a test flow and return results

tools.name: run_suite
tools.description: Execute all flows in a collection

tools.name: get_coverage_gaps
tools.description: Identify untested endpoints and coverage gaps

tools.name: list_flows
tools.description: List all flows in a workspace

tools.name: get_execution
tools.description: Get details of a specific test execution
